entries.name: Storm Shield Core
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: vanilla 1.21.9 has no force-field or multiblock shield; the handheld shield item is the nearest, unrelated analogue
entries.summary: Multiblock Storm Shield generator: a copper core structure that projects a charged protective dome around a base, consuming stored charge while active.

entries.name: Shield Projectile Interception
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: the vanilla shield item blocks projectiles for a single player; the Storm Shield intercepts arrows/tridents/fireballs across the whole dome
entries.summary: Projectile interception for the Storm Shield: incoming projectiles are stopped at the dome surface with a visible ripple effect at the impact point.

entries.name: Shield Mob Repulsion
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: no vanilla mob-repulsion field exists; nearest analogues are warden sonic knockback and wind charge bursts
entries.summary: Hostile mob repulsion for the Storm Shield: hostiles touching the dome are pushed back and take shock damage that scales with stored charge.

entries.name: Lightning-Capture Rods
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: the vanilla lightning_rod (since 1.17, still present in 1.21.9) redirects strikes but discards the energy; capture rods convert strikes into stored charge
entries.summary: Lightning-capture rod block that attracts lightning strikes and converts them into charge fed to connected storage.

entries.name: Leyden Jar Batteries
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: vanilla 1.21.9 has no energy-storage block; copper_bulb is only a light with redstone stages
entries.summary: Leyden Jar battery blocks that store captured charge in tiered capacities, with visible fill levels and comparator output.

entries.name: Oxidation Weapons
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: vanilla 1.21.9 added copper_sword/copper_axe (full copper tool set); Cuprum oxidation weapons add oxidation stages that change damage and effects, and can be waxed to lock a stage
entries.summary: Oxidation-mechanic copper weapons that extend and differentiate from the vanilla 1.21.9 copper gear: stats and on-hit effects shift as the weapon oxidizes.

entries.name: Oxidation Armor
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: vanilla 1.21.9 added copper_helmet/chestplate/leggings/boots and copper horse armor; Cuprum oxidation armor adds visual+mechanical oxidation stages, set bonuses and waxing
entries.summary: Oxidation-mechanic copper armor set that extends and differentiates from the vanilla 1.21.9 copper armor: protection and set bonuses evolve with oxidation stage.

entries.name: Charged Exoskeleton
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: no vanilla powered exoskeleton; wind-charge jump boosts and elytra are the nearest movement analogues
entries.summary: Charge-powered movement exoskeleton granting boosted jumps and a directional dash while charged.

entries.name: Tesla Turrets
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: vanilla 1.21.9 has no automated turret block
entries.summary: Charge-powered Tesla turret blocks that arc shock damage to nearby hostile mobs while drawing from connected batteries.

entries.name: Hovering Mag-Rails
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: vanilla powered_rail accelerates grounded carts; mag-rails levitate carts and target roughly 3x powered-rail speed
entries.summary: Magnetic hover rails: charged rail blocks that levitate minecarts and propel them at about three times powered-rail speed.

entries.name: Pneumatic Item Tubes
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: hoppers/droppers/water streams move items slowly or invisibly; pneumatic tubes are fast point-to-point transport with visible windows showing items in transit
entries.summary: Pneumatic item transport tubes with visible glass windows so items can be watched travelling through the network.

entries.name: Programmable Copper Golems
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: the vanilla 1.21.9 copper golem only moves items from copper chests into other chests; Cuprum golems are programmable for broader utility tasks (harvesting, hauling, button duty)
entries.summary: Programmable utility copper golems extending the vanilla 1.21.9 copper golem with configurable task programs.

entries.name: Copper Fans
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: vanilla 1.21.9 has no fan/air-stream block; breeze wind charges are the nearest air-push analogue
entries.summary: Copper fan blocks producing directional air streams that push entities and items, toggleable by redstone.

entries.name: Copper Grappling Hook
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: no vanilla grappling hook; reeling entities with a fishing rod is the nearest analogue
entries.summary: Copper grappling hook item that latches onto blocks and pulls the player toward the anchor point.

entries.name: Ore Detector
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: vanilla has no ore-finding tool or block
entries.summary: Handheld charged ore detector that pings nearby ore veins with directional feedback.

entries.name: Weighted Plates
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: vanilla light/heavy weighted pressure plates (gold/iron) have fixed response curves; Cuprum plates have player-configurable mass and entity-count thresholds
entries.summary: Configurable weighted pressure plates that trigger on adjustable mass or entity-count thresholds.

entries.name: Backpack Personal Shield
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: totem of undying is a one-shot death save; the backpack shield is a rechargeable wearable damage barrier
entries.summary: Wearable backpack that projects a miniaturized personal Storm Shield around the player, draining its internal charge as it absorbs damage.

entries.name: XP Collector Drones
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: vanilla has no XP automation; the sculk catalyst converts mob XP into sculk but cannot collect orbs for the player
entries.summary: Small charged drones that gather dropped experience orbs and ferry them back to their home station or owner.

entries.name: Conductive Climbing Wire
entries.vanilla_overlap: extends: redstone dust only carries a 15-block signal on floors; conductive wire carries charge over long distances and climbs walls and ceilings
entries.summary: Wall-climbing conductive copper wire for long-distance charge transmission between rods, jars and machines.

entries.name: Oxidation Copper Spikes
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: vanilla has no spike trap block; pointed dripstone, berry bushes and magma deal passive contact damage without scaling
entries.summary: Copper spike blocks whose contact damage scales with their oxidation stage; waxing freezes the stage.

entries.name: Weather Manipulator
entries.vanilla_overlap: none: weather changes only through the /weather command or the natural cycle; vanilla survival has no weather-control block
entries.summary: Charge-hungry weather manipulator block that can summon or dispel thunderstorms, closing the loop with lightning capture.

entries.name: Dynamic Handbook
entries.vanilla_overlap: adjacent: the vanilla recipe book only lists unlocked recipes; the handbook is a full dynamic guide generated from the content catalog
entries.summary: Complete dynamic in-game handbook documenting every Cuprum system, generated from the catalog so it can never go stale.
